name: 冯端
rationale: Career marked by steady advancement, major achievements (e.g., '五朵金花', crystal defects research), and numerous honors including academician status and national awards.
key_turning_points: 1964: 系列科研成果被誉为南京大学早期科研“五朵金花”之一
1980: 当选中国科学院数学物理学部学部委员
1982: 科研成果“晶体缺陷的研究”获国家自然科学二等奖

name: 冯纯伯
rationale: Consistent academic career with steady promotions and awards, no major interruptions or dramatic events.
key_turning_points: 1958: 获苏联技术科学副博士学位
1995: 当选为中国科学院院士

name: 刘振兴
rationale: Steady career progression with major scientific contributions (e.g., '刘氏模式', vortex-induced reconnection) and prestigious awards including academician status and international recognition.
key_turning_points: 1982: 建立木星磁层磁盘模型，被称为“刘氏模式”
1995: 当选为中国科学院院士
1997: 提出地球空间双星探测计划

name: 吴征镒
rationale: Career marked by early political activism, steady academic advancement, major contributions to botany (e.g., '中国植物志'), and high honors including academician status.
key_turning_points: 1955: 正式批准为学部委员
1958: 调任昆明植物研究所所长
1982: 橡胶树北移技术获国家技术发明奖一等奖

name: 唐明述
rationale: Consistent research career with steady achievements in cement chemistry, culminating in academician status and national awards.
key_turning_points: 1988: 碱—集料反应项目获得国家自然科学奖二等奖
1995: 当选为中国工程院院士
2012: 获国家科学技术进步奖

name: 张本仁
rationale: Steady academic career with consistent contributions to geochemistry, recognition through awards and academician status, no major disruptions.
key_turning_points: 1989: 获第一届李四光地质科学奖
1999: 当选中国科学院地学部院士
1999: “秦岭造山带岩石圈结构与演化”获国家自然科学二等奖

name: 张炳炎
rationale: Career defined by major engineering achievements (e.g., '向阳红' ships), steady advancement, and high honors including academician status and national awards.
key_turning_points: 1971: 任'向阳红10'号船总设计师
1985: '向阳红'远洋调查船获国家科技进步特等奖
1995: 当选为中国工程院院士

name: 戴元本
rationale: Consistent research career in theoretical physics with steady promotions and recognition, including academician status and national awards.
key_turning_points: 1966: 在北京物理讨论会上就层子模型做专题发言
1980: 当选中国科学院数学物理学部学部委员
1982: 层子模型获国家自然科学二等奖

name: 梁思礼
rationale: Career marked by major achievements in missile and space technology, steady advancement, and numerous honors including academician status and national awards.
key_turning_points: 1964: 东风2号导弹飞行试验成功
1985: 获国家科学技术进步特等奖
1993: 当选中国科学院院士

name: 沈克琦
rationale: Career interrupted by Cultural Revolution persecution, but recovered to hold leadership roles at Peking University and contribute to education reform.
key_turning_points: 1966: 文化大革命中受迫害
1977: 参加邓小平主持的科教座谈会，支持恢复高考
1978: 任北京大学副校长

name: 沈志云
rationale: Career defined by major contributions to railway engineering (e.g., '沈-赫-叶氏理论'), steady advancement, and dual academician status.
key_turning_points: 1983: 提出沈-赫-叶氏理论
1991: 当选中国科学院学部委员
1999: 机车车辆滚动振动试验台获国家科技进步一等奖

name: 涂铭旌
rationale: Career marked by major achievements in materials science, steady advancement, and high honors including academician status and national awards.
key_turning_points: 1987: 获国家级科技进步一等奖（低碳马氏体应用）
1995: 当选中国工程院院士
2007: 获国家科技进步二等奖（微特电机用纳米晶复合永磁材料）

name: 潘家铮
rationale: Career marked by major achievements in hydropower engineering, steady advancement, and high honors including dual academician status and national awards.
key_turning_points: 1981: 当选为中国科学院院士
1985: 任水利电力部总工程师
1994: 中国工程院成立，被任命为中国工程院副院长、当选为首批院士

name: 王德滋
rationale: Career interrupted by political persecution (labeled '白专典型', Cultural Revolution), but recovered to achieve academic leadership and national awards.
key_turning_points: 1959: 被作为‘白专典型’受到批判
1966: 文化大革命中被关进‘牛棚’批斗
1982: ‘华南不同时代花岗岩类与成矿关系’获国家自然科学二等奖

name: 王文兴
rationale: Career marked by major achievements in environmental chemistry, steady advancement, and high honors including academician status and national awards.
key_turning_points: 1985: 《兰州西固地区光化学氧化剂污染控制对策的研究》获国家科技进步二等奖
1998: 《我国酸沉降及其生态环境影响研究》获国家科技进步一等奖
1999: 当选中国工程院院士

name: 王翰章
rationale: Consistent career in oral and maxillofacial surgery with steady advancement, recognition through awards and international fellowships, minor disruption during Cultural Revolution.
key_turning_points: 1966: 文化大革命开始，被批斗
1978: 晋升教授，任四川医学院副院长
1986: 被授予国际牙医师学院院士

name: 王金陵
rationale: Career interrupted by false imprisonment in 1950, but recovered to achieve major contributions to soybean breeding and high honors.
key_turning_points: 1950: 含冤入狱半年，后无罪释放
1959: 东农4号育成推广，成为黑龙江省大豆育种里程碑
1979: 被任命为黑龙江省副省长

name: 胡含
rationale: Career marked by major scientific breakthroughs (first wheat pollen plant), steady advancement, and high honors including national awards.
key_turning_points: 1971: 诱导出世界上第一株小麦花粉植株
1978: 花粉单倍体育种获国家重大科技成果奖
1997: 小麦花粉无性系变异机制与配子类型的重组与表达规律获国家自然科学二等奖

name: 蒋亦元
rationale: Career interrupted by Cultural Revolution persecution and labor reform, but recovered to achieve major engineering contributions and honors.
key_turning_points: 1966: 在文化大革命中接受批判
1968: 下迁到汤原县香兰农场劳动改造
1970: 研制聚四氟乙烯覆层水田筑埂机

name: 谢家荣
rationale: Career marked by major geological discoveries, steady advancement, and high honors including academician status, despite wartime disruptions.
key_turning_points: 1946: 发现淮南八公山新煤田
1948: 当选中央研究院院士
1955: 中国科学院学部委员

name: 钟训正
rationale: Consistent career in architecture with major design achievements (e.g., Beijing Railway Station, Nanjing Yangtze River Bridge) and steady recognition.
key_turning_points: 1959: 北京火车站综合方案被周恩来总理选定为实施方案
1960: 南京长江大桥桥头堡红旗方案被周恩来总理选定为实施方案
1999: 作品“太湖饭店”获国际建协第20届世界建筑师大会当代中国建筑艺术创作成就奖

name: 钟香崇
rationale: Career marked by major contributions to refractory materials, steady advancement, and high honors including academician status and international recognition.
key_turning_points: 1949: 获英国利兹大学博士学位，回国
1991: 当选为中国科学院学部委员（院士）
2000: 获何梁何利基金科学与技术进步奖

name: 陆钟武
rationale: Career marked by major contributions to metallurgical engineering, steady advancement, and high honors including academician status and national awards.
key_turning_points: 1984: 被任命为东北工学院院长
1985: 《压下炉头式板坯加热炉》获国家科技进步二等奖
1997: 当选中国工程院院士

name: 陈志恺
rationale: Career interrupted by political persecution (labeled '中右分子', Cultural Revolution), but recovered to achieve major contributions to hydrology and national awards.
key_turning_points: 1958: 被定为中右分子，取消预备党员资格
1970: 下放四川
1978: 调回北京

name: 高守一
rationale: Career marked by major contributions to cholera research, steady advancement, and high honors including academician status and national awards.
key_turning_points: 1961: 确诊我国首次副霍乱
1991: 《埃尔托型霍乱弧菌两类菌株的研究及其在霍乱防病中的应用》获国家科学技术进步一等奖
1994: 当选为中国工程院医药与卫生工程学首批院士

name: 黄旭华
rationale: Career marked by secret work on nuclear submarines, major achievements, and high honors including academician status and national recognition.
key_turning_points: 1958: 秘密选调参加核潜艇研制工作
1970: 我国第一艘攻击型核潜艇下水
1988: 亲自参加核潜艇极限深潜试验，成为世界第一人
